main_failures: The generated garment introduces a more structured, jacket-like front edge compared to the raw, draped edge of the reference
The silhouette in the generated image appears more like a cardigan with defined armholes rather than the continuous draped panel/ruana construction of the original
evaluation.summary: The generated image successfully captures the color palette and the specific crochet/knit stripe texture. However, it loses some of the 'ruana' essence by adding more structure to the front opening and making the sleeves look more like traditional set-in sleeves rather than a draped wrap.
